ground_truth.title: Fairfax VA - Best Personal Training - Foundation Fitness
ground_truth.main_content: Foundation Fitness is the best rated personal training studio in Fairfax, VA. With over 3,000 satisfied clients, 2,000+ five-star Google reviews, and 15 years of excellence across twelve DMV locations, we are dedicated to inspiring you to be your best. We offer results-focused personal training services tailored to your specific needs, goals, and circumstances. Our approach helps you lose stubborn fat, build your ideal physique, or overcome chronic pain and injury. We create tailored wellness strategies including personal training, nutritional guidance, stretching and mobility work, prenatal personal training, post physical therapy and sports rehab, and weight loss programs. Together, we support and uplift each other, helping you achieve your health goals. Located at 10387 Main Street, LL2, Fairfax, VA 22030. Book your free consultation today!
